routing_decision.reason: Custom bugfix in pure markdown codebase — no template matches
routing_decision.skip_reason_phase_2: Root causes fully identified in Phase 0 analysis

security_evaluation.reason: Markdown-only changes to orchestration instructions. No secrets, no credentials, no runtime code, no user data.

jit.reason: Single-file fix with clear scope — JIT not beneficial

fast_track.reason: Two distinct bugs requiring coordinated changes — not a trivial single-line fix

bugs.summary: Step 4e does not create story sub-issues — only epics
bugs.fix: Expand Step 4e with explicit story parsing and sub-issue creation sub-steps

bugs.summary: No step transitions tracker issues to Done after implementation
bugs.fix: Add new Step 7e to batch-close implemented story and epic issues

config_sources.level_4_meta_agent: phase_subset, jit.enabled, fast_track.enabled, task_type, confidence, routing_decision
